title: Minecart HUD
description: Add a head-up display to the minecart.
body:
# Minecart HUD
Add a head-up display to the minecart.

## Loader
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20for-Fabric-dbd0b4)](https://fabricmc.net)

## Environment
![Client only](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Client%20only-3c8527)

## Compatibility
- ### Fabric
  - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Required)
  - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Recommended) (Custom configuration features)
  - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Recommended) (Mod configuration entry)

## Progress
Check out the latest development progress here. [Development Progress](https://www.windysky.top/docs/minecraft-java-edition/minecart-hud/version)

## Main Gallery
![Big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f25abe3d096104c1bd6782ac8bfc32bcb396b4e.png)

## Features
- Lightweight client mod, displays minecart speed and direction by default.
- Customizable display styles are supported.

![DetailedColor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/243d460031293c9ec54e232a7a23e569af7a2033.png)

![SimpleColor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c528c80f0f561e49885dc48df6d0f788701e0615_0.webp)

## Configuration

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19a45bbe1e2c16724b57cc94112398c8c3921a2_0.webp)
